name: Dexchlorpheniramine
description: Dexchlorpheniramine is a potent S-enantiomer of chlorpheniramine. The salt form dexchlorpheniramine maleate as the active ingredient is available as a prescription drug indicated for adjuctive therapy for allergic and anaphylactic reactions. It is an antihistamine drug with anticholinergic (drying) and sedative actions. It disrupts histamine signalling by competing with histamine for cell receptor sites on effector cells.

interactions.name: Benzylpenicilloyl Polylysine
interactions.description: Dexchlorpheniramine may decrease effectiveness of Benzylpenicilloyl Polylysine as a diagnostic agent.

interactions.name: Hyaluronidase
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Hyaluronidase can be decreased when used in combination with Dexchlorpheniramine.

interactions.name: Betahistine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Betahistine can be decreased when used in combination with Dexchlorpheniramine.

interactions.name: Pseudoephedrine
interactions.description: Pseudoephedrine may decrease the sedative activities of Dexchlorpheniramine.
